name: COLCOT low-dose colchicine post-myocardial-infarction trial
summary: A randomized double-blind trial testing 0.5 mg daily colchicine within 30 days after myocardial infarction.
population: Patients recruited within 30 days after myocardial infarction

trial_details.horizon_note: Results are already in the public evidence layer, so this is not an open no-result watch item.
trial_details.why_it_matters: Results matter for Cytokine and Inflammasome Modulation because they can show whether the intervention changes health or disease-risk outcomes and safety in Patients recruited within 30 days after myocardial infarction. That is still narrower than proof of broad aging reversal.
